THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSIN-YU LIU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDY KADEE VO HOAL TRAN VANG KIM LE DEAN CAN DO SALLY THUAN LE $1,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,290.00, DEFENDANT RANDY KADEE VO MAY RECEIVE A CREDIT OF $240 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT BY RETURNING PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL PROPERTY TO HER WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS SALLY THUAN LE, DEAN CAN DO, VANG KIM LE, HOAL TRAN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
